title: AI-powered Chatbot Dialogue Generator
scenario: Generate a 10-turn dialogue between a customer and a chatbot for a retail store. The dialogue must be based on the provided persona and cover topics such as product recommendations, payment methods, and return policies. Use the chatbot persona's tone and language to guide the conversation.
constraints: Must include a product recommendation within the first 2 turns
Must address a customer complaint within the last 3 turns

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the response adhere to the provided persona's tone, language, and style?
Is a product recommendation made within the first 2 turns?
Is a customer complaint addressed within the last 3 turns?
Does the response conform to the provided 10-turn structure?
